title: dryopteris totta
intro: Dryopteris totta, also known as the Black Fern or Himalayan Black Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, known for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dryopteris totta include reducing inflammation and pain, treating fever, and aiding in the management of respiratory and digestive issues. Dryopteris totta is typically prepared as a decoction or a powder for medicinal use, with the dried fronds being used in herbal teas, capsules, or supplements.
